subject: CIR.NO. 237- Change in School timings for Annual Function practice
body:

*          SRI SATHYA SAI VIDYA VIHAR*

*CIR.NO.SSSVV/2025-26/237                                             Date:
14th November**, 2025*

Dear Parents




Sai Ram!



Kindly note the revised school timings due to the practice for the
forthcoming Annual Function.



*School timings w.e.f. Monday, 17th November 2025:*

*Classes*

*Arrival*

*Departure*

10:00 a.m.

4:00  p.m.

*NON-PARTICIPANTS*

10:00 a.m.

1:30 p.m.



*However, there is NO CHANGE in the School Timings for classes ? Nursery,
Junior Montessori & Senior Montessori.*



*SENIOR SCHOOL*

* Note: Bus routes for the departure time have been attached herewith.
Please contact Mr. Jitu Bhai Patel (9826095139) for any query regarding
transport.*



Looking forward to your cooperation.



With Best Regards







Dr. Anju Chopra

Principal
